description: Identify one key contributor from each of the 'Exmh', 'SpamAssassin', and 'ILUG' (Irish Linux Users Group) open-source communities by finding a distinct sender email address for each in your inbox. Record these three email addresses (one per line) in a text file at ~/Documents/summit_nominees.txt. In BlueMail, prepare a draft email to events@company.com with the subject 'Confidential: Community Summit 2025 Invitation' and a professional body. Ensure the three identified contributor email addresses are placed in the BCC field for privacy.
